---
name: "migrate-page"
description: "Export or synchronize a single Confluence page."
---

# Migrate Single Page

Gather the details below, then outline the export/update steps.

## Required
- Space key and page title/ID
- Target path or file name

## Optional
- Include children? (yes/no)
- Attachment handling and image path rewriting

## Output
- Brief plan with MCP calls (fetch page, export Markdown, download attachments).
- Notes on formatting fixes and validation checks before committing the exported file.
